report.c(3) Library Functions Manual report.c(3)

NAME

report.c - Command-line tool for crash report analysis and summarization.

SYNOPSIS

Data Structures


struct thread_filter_list
Dynamic array of thread IDs for filtering instrumentation logs. struct report_config
Configuration for panic report generation. struct log_record
Parsed instrumentation log record. struct thread_entry
Hash table entry for thread-local last log record. struct collect_ctx_t

Typedefs


typedef struct thread_filter_list thread_filter_list_t
Dynamic array of thread IDs for filtering instrumentation logs. typedef struct report_config report_config_t
Configuration for panic report generation. typedef struct log_record log_record_t
Parsed instrumentation log record. typedef struct thread_entry thread_entry_t
Hash table entry for thread-local last log record.

Functions


int main (int argc, char **argv)

Detailed Description

Command-line tool for crash report analysis and summarization.

Generates and summarizes crash reports from instrumentation runtime logs. Analyzes instrumentation traces to identify error patterns and provide diagnostic information.

Definition in file report.c.

Typedef Documentation

typedef struct log_record log_record_t

Parsed instrumentation log record. Represents a single line from an instrumentation log file with all fields extracted and parsed.

typedef struct report_config report_config_t

Configuration for panic report generation.

typedef struct thread_entry thread_entry_t

Hash table entry for thread-local last log record. Used by uthash to track the most recent log record for each thread when generating panic reports.

typedef struct thread_filter_list thread_filter_list_t

Dynamic array of thread IDs for filtering instrumentation logs.

Function Documentation

int main (int argc, char ** argv)

Definition at line 576 of file report.c.

576                                 {
577   report_config_t config = {
578       .log_dir = NULL,
579       .log_file = NULL,
580       .include_filter = NULL,
581       .exclude_filter = NULL,
582       .threads = {.values = NULL, .count = 0, .capacity = 0},
583       .emit_raw_line = false,
584   };
585 
586   log_init(NULL, LOG_INFO, false, false);
587 
588   int exit_code = EXIT_SUCCESS;
589   if (!parse_arguments(argc, argv, &config)) {
590     exit_code = ERROR_USAGE;
591     goto cleanup;
592   }
593 
594   thread_entry_t *entries = NULL;
595   if (!collect_entries(&config, &entries)) {
596     exit_code = ERROR_GENERAL;
597     destroy_entries(&entries);
598     goto cleanup;
599   }
600 
601   print_summary(&config, &entries);
602   destroy_entries(&entries);
603 
604 cleanup:
605   thread_filter_list_destroy(&config.threads);
606   log_destroy();
607   return exit_code;
608 }




References ERROR_GENERAL, ERROR_USAGE,
    log_destroy(), LOG_INFO, log_init(), and
    report_config::threads.
